tweet.text:
Dear team,

Formerly known as $LIT, now known as $HEI token, makes transactions sustainable in the AI agent field, which is currently the best narrative. This project has x402, base and AI agent discourses that are externally focused. It is also a project in which Ryan is a major partner. Ryan became the chief consultant of $WLFI and made his name known, increasing his recognition and reliability in the industry. This situation gave investors confidence in the solidity of both the infrastructure and the team of the project, but the market strategy of the Hei token has a cap between 5-10 million USDT and a maximum daily volume of 400k USDT, which is a similar characteristic of 17 projects that have recently been delisted on Binance, and in this case, it puts the quality Hei project in the category of a candidate to be delisted from Binance. If there is no volume for Binance, there is no point in the project, no matter how good it is. If it is delisted, it would be a shame for this quality project, and it would also harm Ryan, who has a good position and name in the industry. Just because the project is of high quality or tweets every day does not mean that it will remain on the exchange. Please increase volume to the project by working with a better market maker.

$HEI #HEI @heimaNetwork

@ryanfang95
